name: Kevin Hern
subject: Celebrating the birth of Christ
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Hern For Congress
body:
Merry Christmas from my family to yours! Read more >>
Dear Peter, I hope you are spending today gathered with your loved ones, so won’t take much of your time. I just wanted to send a note to wish you a Merry Christmas and let you know that my family and I are thinking of each and every one of you. As we have been reflecting not just on this holy day, but also on the year we just lived through, one scripture verse keeps coming to mind: _**“The Word became flesh and made his dwelling among us. We have seen his glory, the glory of the one and only Son, who came from the Father, full of grace and truth.” — John 1:14**_ I won’t pretend like this year hasn’t been through some difficult challenges. Every single person has been affected in some way or another by the coronavirus pandemic. But God has given us His glory — our savior Jesus Christ, born to a virgin and placed in a manger because there was no room at the inn. Things may have seemed dire for Mary and Joseph the night that Jesus was born, but it was the birth of God’s greatest glory, a love full of grace and truth! Christ is our hope, our joy, and the great comforter. May His peace be with you this day and always. Merry Christmas, Kevin Hern id:2020-12-15-16:44:28:578t Paid For By Hern For Congress
---

subject: Wishing You a Happy Holidays!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Clarke Tucker for State Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/fAru8GzLh6phWAQ9RapCqNlC2ig463OmAYA6SBz5QRc=/MqIIJoFAUtVCAsQKqVLLmBHSn6OG6hnuXLetRgGOfW4=)

Dear friend --

This Christmas and holiday season is a little different for everyone. For us, our service last night was outside and cold! But it was still beautiful and meaningful for us.

To deliver the message from our service, I hope all who celebrate have a Merry little Christmas as you can, wherever you are, and whoever you're with, this year. And that we all, whether we celebrate Christmas or not, can find beauty and meaning in this holiday season.

Looking ahead, the legislative session starts January 11. Please do not hesitate to reach out to me during the session. You can email me here, but the best way to catch me during the session is to call or text me at 501-247-8363.

I'm thankful for each of you and wish each of you a joyous holiday season and a happier 2021.

Clarke

Paid for by Clarke Tucker for State Senate

| View the video transcript below:
Hi, everyone. It's Kelly. I want to wish you and your family a very Merry Christmas.
Today, we celebrate the birth of our Savior. From Luke, 2:11: "For unto you is born this day in the city of David a Savior, which is Christ the Lord."
And whether together in person, or in spirit with family and friends, I hope you have a moment to reflect on the meaning and the joys of this season. This Christmas, I want to recognize those who serve on the front lines of our nation, of our communities, and in healthcare.
2020 has been a tough year. But with Christmas comes new life and new hope. It's a reminder that the best is yet to come. Merry Christmas.
May God continue to bless each and every one of us, our great state of Georgia, and the United States of America.

---

subject: O come, let us adore Him!
body:
From everyone at Tea Party Patriots Action to you and your family, Merry Christmas! Over two thousand years ago, a baby was born in a manger and changed the world! As C.S. Lewis said, “Once in our world, a stable had something in it that was bigger than our whole world.” Christmas is a great time to remember that while our political battles are important, our lives, hearts, and souls are meant for more than just politics. And so, it is our hope that your Christmas season is full of joy, peace, and the wonders of His love. _“Merry be your Christmas. Peaceful be your home. Joyful be your family, blessed be each one.”_ **Merry Christmas!** Jenny Beth and the rest of the support team | |

I want to wish you and your loved ones a very Merry Christmas! I hope you get to spend your holiday season surrounded by the love and joy of those close to you.
This Christmas season may be different for a lot of us, but we can be thankful that we live in this amazing land of promise and opportunity. The vaccine is on its way, and America looks forward to healing and bouncing back stronger than ever.
I can be thankful for your amazing support this year, and your dedication to the preservation of our great nation. Without you, none of this is possible, and I can't thank you enough.

**Merry Christmas 🎄**
[ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=0e6fc9a749b14c8abbb0301083f63418&_e=XN1fbpBkQuvVJNEHCLB0FwaW-f2f-72QcW2GydarRLsROH0IU0w0mEQYY9LjCgQm3ON1bhJvDO4o1VG-Z564v7It4hBvjTRhdhqkxMPKqP7EeOqqU3UZ944VLeg6nGipBxKagLAaOldVyAUtggt06VOtbF3n-PGOiTr3jzrN-DdseZ_3YKBXp0iaDyn1_sCBitLWMRQ75pSjqPMXRAaboGQ_i5YOro_k6VYrfO85IprmMdfIUdMGfjAsCqQOZKShrbOhQaLIQpdxrjzmO8u4A8Mei4sYMVb2oLThcdBld7s%3D)
Dear Friend,

I know I joke around a lot on Twitter, but I’m going to be serious for a minute. 2020 has been a tough year for everyone, and tougher for some folks than others. But the wonderful thing about the holidays is that it forces us to remember the good things in life and be thankful for them.

I, for one, am incredibly grateful for the opportunity to represent East Tennessee in Congress. Folks know Tennessee has always been my home. I’ve never lived anywhere else and never wanted to. Going to work every day for my friends and neighbors is a real privilege.

I’m also grateful for my family who puts up with all my jokes and wisecracks. It took me a while to find my wife, Kelly, but they say “good things come to those who wait.” Being Kelly’s husband and Isabel’s (AKA “the boss”) dad is a blessing.

"The boss" even made me some cookies while I was in D.C.
Finally, I’m thankful that we live in this amazing, resilient country. Just look at what we were able to accomplish with the coronavirus vaccine. Thanks to President Trump, the private sector and the never-give-up attitude of the American people, we did what all the experts said was impossible. It just goes to show: never underestimate the American people.

I hope you’ll take a moment this holiday season to find the joy and meaning in the middle of the upheaval and thank God for the goodness we enjoy.

Merry Christmas, happy holidays, and thank you for everything.

Best,
Tim, Kelly and Isabel
|

body:
I’m sure your festivities are already underway, so I’ll keep this note brief... I
wanted to send you a quick email from my family to yours, wishing.....

Peter,

I’m sure your festivities are already underway, so I’ll keep this note brief...
I wanted to send you a quick email from my family to yours, wishing you a very
Merry Christmas, a happy holiday, and a blessed New Year.

2020 has been a challenge for all of us. But even with the pandemic, I hope,
like me, you are able to be with family this week and be reminded of the
meaning of the season and the blessing of God’s love for all of us.

Jane and I are especially grateful for your support and friendship during this
past year. Knowing that you are at my side is the best gift I can possibly
receive.

>From our family to yours, from Jane and me, Jed & Sara, Will, Sally and, of
course, Huckleberry... Wishing you and your family Christmas blessings and a
very happy New Year.

– Rob Portman

body:
Friend,

I hope this email finds you well and that you and your loved ones are enjoying
a safe and happy holiday season.

Emily and I are delighted to celebrate our daughter Olivia's very first
Christmas this year. It has been a big year for the Hunt family, and as we
reflect on the past 12 months, our hearts are filled with gratitude for the
opportunities we have had to serve Texas' 7th Congressional District alongside
patriots like you.

We wish you peace, love, and Christmas blessings this holiday season.

Merry Christmas from our family to yours.

Sincerely,
Wesley

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jerry?=
subject: Merry Christmas!
body:
| | | |
---
| **Merry Christmas!**
---
| | |
---
| **Hi Friends! Merry Christmas! May God’s blessings, peace, joy, strength, encouragement, and love be upon you and your whole family! ** **While this year has had tough challenges, I absolutely believe this one thing has always been true - God is a good God that loves to surprise us with good news, even in a time or way we never expected. Roughly 2,000 years ago, the powerful Roman Empire was ruling the people of God, and they were praying for deliverance. God heard their prayers and came in a surprise fashion with humility to be born in manger amongst animals. Jesus the King was not afraid to get humble and truly live among us, and like us. He gave us the greatest gift we could have of all - Himself. Through Him, we can have eternal life, forgiveness of sin, access to his unlimited joy, and life abundantly. ** **Lisa and I pray that you enjoy this Christmas, spend some great time with your family, and enjoy getting to know the humble and surprising King Jesus in a new way today.

God bless you, and God bless America

-Jerry, Lisa, (& Michael) Evans**

**_Please check out my [website](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=898b38e4f5&e=b78e7c4d40) to learn more about me and [my vision](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=fb8a5759a1&e=b78e7c4d40) for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey._**
